items.name: alert
items.title: Alert
items.description: Dismissible banner with user-provided leading icon, spring enter/exit, blur, and optional fixed viewport positions. Framer Motion.

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar
items.description: Circular avatar with spring entrance, image fade-in, fallback initials, hover glow and pulse ring. Fixed 42×42. Framer Motion.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Animated badge with a looping shimmer wave. Spring entrance, optional bg/text/wave color overrides. Framer Motion.

items.name: breadcrumbs
items.title: Breadcrumbs
items.description: Breadcrumb trail with spring separators, hover lift, and a subtle shimmer on the current page. Built with Framer Motion.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Primary action control with CVA variants, pointer ripples via Framer Motion, and default type="button". Forwards ref and native button props.

items.name: calendar
items.title: Calendar
items.description: Compact monthly calendar with animated month transitions, selectable days, and date-fns-powered grid generation.

items.name: checkbox-group
items.title: Checkbox group
items.description: Multi-select option list with bordered empty state and a primary tick only when checked, plus hover/tap motion on each row. Framer Motion + Lucide.

items.name: collapsible
items.title: Collapsible
items.description: Accessible collapsible primitive built on Radix UI. Exports Collapsible, CollapsibleTrigger, and CollapsibleContent for building expandable sections, FAQs, and disclosure patterns.

items.name: combobox
items.title: Combobox
items.description: Searchable single-select input with inline filtering, arrow-key navigation, animated dropdown motion, and an optional clear action.

items.name: context-menu
items.title: Context Menu
items.description: Native-feeling context menu with fixed-position viewport-aware placement, per-item icons and shortcuts, and spring entrance motion.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: Modal dialog on Radix Dialog with Framer Motion overlay and content springs, staggered children, and an animated close control. Pass the same open boolean to DialogContent as the Dialog root for AnimatePresence.

items.name: drawer
items.title: Drawer
items.description: Controlled overlay drawer with side-based slide motion, staggered content reveal, and a built-in close header.

items.name: hover-card
items.title: Hover Card
items.description: Inline hover card with delayed open and close timing, Slot-based custom triggers, and a spring-driven content panel.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: Standard rounded text field with an always-visible label, focus ring motion, and per-character spring animation on the visible text overlay. Framer Motion.

items.name: motion-accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: Single-select accordion with spring height, staggered text, and rotating plus control. Built with Framer Motion.

items.name: popover
items.title: Popover
items.description: Controlled popover built on Radix with portal-based positioning, optional anchor support, and a spring-driven content panel.

items.name: radiogroup
items.title: Radio group
items.description: Single-select option list with shared layoutId highlight, spring ring/dot on the control, staggered row entrance, and optional descriptions. Framer Motion only — native button radios with role=radiogroup.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: Animated single-select dropdown with staggered options, chevron rotation, scaleY panel, row hover slide, and check mark on the active item. Framer Motion + Lucide.

items.name: slider
items.title: Slider
items.description: Range control with spring-animated track and thumb, full-width pointer drag, and optional label and live value. Framer Motion.

items.name: spinner
items.title: Spinner
items.description: Loading indicator with an animated ring or bouncing dots. Framer Motion; uses primary and muted theme tokens.

items.name: switch
items.title: Switch
items.description: Animated toggle with spring thumb travel and smooth track color crossfade. Native button with role=switch, forwards ref. Framer Motion.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: Animated hover/focus tooltip with spring entrance, blur fade, directional offset, and optional delay and side placement. Built with Framer Motion.
